text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
190 
STATE_CD 
LABEL: 
Submitting State Alpha Abbreviation 
DESCRIPTION: State Code associated with the Medicaid Beneficiary Identifier (the MSIS_ID) 
LONG NAME: STATE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system/CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Two-character postal state code 
AK = Alaska 
AL = Alabama 
AR = Arkansas 
AZ = Arizona 
CA = California 
CO = Colorado 
CT = Connecticut
